funFacts: Historically, the Camp Campfire has captured the imagination of artists, scientists, and educators alike.
Designed for Easy difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
